resources.string: No dictionaries yet\nTap + to create one
Delete dictionary \"%s\"? All words will also be deleted.
No words yet\nTap + to add one
Fill missing phrases in this dictionary. Word count: %d.
Words that already have phrases or confirmed empty results will be skipped. Failed words can be retried later.
Select a word to view details
No units yet. Tap \"New Unit\" to create one
Delete %d selected words? This cannot be undone.
This will send one AI request per word for %d words
Incremental: Resume from last checkpoint, preserving progress. Supports pause/resume.
Full Rebuild: Clear all edge data and start fresh.
Invalid range: min length cannot exceed max length
Type a related word you recall
How many words to study today?
After reaching the goal, current word group will finish before stopping
No articles in this category yet
Tap the button below to scan a paper
No tasks in current template, please add in \"Template\"
High-quality mode searches for confusable words, synonyms, cognates, and similar words online before organizing. Applies to both single-word and batch background organize.
Increases time and token cost, but captures high-frequency exam confusables. Falls back to normal mode when reference is unavailable.
Show a note input on the pre-answer screen in both normal study and brainstorm mode. Added related words are promoted to confirmed relations, and missing edges go through background pool organize.
Uses fast model by default. Switching to search model uses the \"Search Model\" scope for reference retrieval.
Quality-first pool build parameters. Window size controls batch comparison size; concurrency and rate limit affect background speed and API pressure.
Aggressive: Retry retryable errors with short delays; abort entire build on non-retryable errors immediately.
Lenient: Retry all failures, only abort after retries exhausted. Retry interval = failure count × 10s (max 2 min).
Takes effect from the next word after change (consistent with concurrency setting).
When enabled, auto-resumes 10 minutes after abort due to retry failure, unlimited (suitable for overnight unattended). Can still cancel or fill chunks manually.
Number of candidate words per AI batch. E.g., 50 means 1 target + 50 candidates per call. Larger = slower per call but broader coverage.
Maximum simultaneous AI requests. Higher = faster organize, but more network and API quota usage.
Limits AI requests per minute to avoid API rate limiting.
Select the app interface language. Restart required to apply.

Use cases:
· Select 10 topic-relevant phrases from the phrase bank for writing practice mode
· Evaluate whether the required phrases were used as a separate item

Essay scoring still uses the main model; phrase usage does not affect the essay score.
Configure default reading source and concurrent loading count for online article details.
Are you sure you want to delete provider "%1$s"?
Adjust scoring settings in Settings → Auto-score Online Articles
No relationship data.\nGenerate a word pool on the dictionary page first.
Pool strategy %s focus word does not exist.
Duplicate dictionary name in cloud manifest: %s
Cloud manifest references missing dictionary file: %s
Cloud manifest references missing dictionary index: %s
Cloud update word not found locally: %s
Word %s cloud UID differs from local, cannot sync safely. Please handle manually.
Rename target word record not found: %d
Pool strategy %s references non-existent words, cannot sync safely.
Pool strategy %s has pools with fewer than 2 members.
Pool strategy %s focus word does not exist.
Unsupported question bank schema version: %d, please upgrade
Pool build stopped: word \"%1$s\" group %2$d/%3$d returned invalid data after %4$d attempts.\nReason: %5$s\nProgress saved. Check AI service/model config and retry.
Paragraph tools at end of each paragraph, for translation or analysis
Select letters first, then add sentence options
Select letters first, then add options
Select letters first, then add titles
Translation practice not counted in error stats
No sample essay. Please search or try again later
When enabled, ten English phrases are selected from your phrase bank and should be used in this essay attempt.
Phrase usage is a separate evaluation item and does not affect the essay score.
Takes effect from next request; global setting preserved.
No providers. Add one in Settings first.
This provider has no API Key configured. Build requests will fail after switching. Configure in Settings first.
Switching writes to global \"Pool Organize\" model and persists. Mid-build switches take effect from next request (including failed retries).
Paste JSON array (fill [] if no edges)
Tap a block to view server response
Build stopped at group %d, tap highlighted block to manually fill
No dictionaries yet, please create one first
Ask about vocabulary, grammar, translation, writing, or reading
The stored pool structure is healthy
Focus not a member: %1$d · Duplicate pools: %2$d
%d existing pools have no supporting edges and cannot be repaired losslessly. Restore a complete backup or rebuild them.
Persisted membership groups do not match the complete layout derived from the current effective edges.
Edge warnings: orphan %1$d · self-loop %2$d · unknown type %3$d
Cleaning invalid edges and atomically replacing pools by strategy. No AI calls; effective edges stay unchanged.
